BeforeProjectileLaunched.description: Fires before a projectile is launched, allowing you to cancel the event.

parameters.name: shooter
parameters.notes: The entity that launched the projectile (may not exist).

parameters.name: projectileType
parameters.notes: The type of projectile that hit.

parameters.name: position
parameters.notes: The position from which the projectile was launched.

parameters.name: velocity
parameters.notes: The velocity of the projectile when launched.

parameters.name: sourceItemType
parameters.notes: The type of item from which the projectile was launched, if the projectile was directly fired from the item.

parameters.name: cancelled
parameters.notes: If set to true, the projectile launch will be cancelled.

examples.description: Cancel all telepearl throws
examples.code:
-- Cancel all telepearl throws
Events.BeforeProjectileLaunched(function(event)
    if (event.shooter == nil) then
        return
    end
    
    if (event.projectileType == "telepearl") then
       event.cancelled = true
    end
end)

BlockPlace.description: Fires when a Player places a block

parameters.name: player
parameters.notes: Player placing the block (if placed by a player).

parameters.name: position
parameters.notes: Position in the world the block is being placed at.

parameters.name: blockType
parameters.notes: The type of the block being placed.

parameters.name: cancelled
parameters.notes: If set to true, the block place will be denied.

examples.description: Fortify all blocks placed by players to Stone Brick
examples.code:
-- Fortify all blocks placed by players to Stone Brick
Events.BlockPlace(function(event)
    -- Only fortify player blocks
    if (not event.player) then
        return
    end
    -- Only replace wool blocks
    if not string.includes(event.blockType, "wool") then
        return
    end
    
    
    BlockService.placeBlock(ItemType.STONE_BRICK, event.position)
    SoundService.playSound(Sound.FORTIFY_BLOCK, event.position)
    event.cancelled = true
end)

BlockBreak.description: Fires when a Player breaks a block

parameters.name: player
parameters.notes: Player who broke the block.

parameters.name: position
parameters.notes: Position in the world the block was broken at.

parameters.name: blockType
parameters.notes: The type of the block being broken.

examples.description: Only consider ceramic block breaks
examples.code:
Events.BlockBreak(function(event)
    if (not event.player) then
        return
    end

    -- Only consider ceramic block breaks
    if (event.blockType == ItemType.BLASTPROOF_CERAMIC) then
        InventoryService.giveItem(event.player, ItemType.FIREBALL, 1, true)
    end
end)

BedAlarmTriggered.description: Fires when a bed alarm is triggered.

parameters.name: intruder
parameters.notes: The intruder player that triggered the bed alarm.

parameters.name: team
parameters.notes: The team whose bed alarm went off.

examples.description: Send out a broadcast to the game server when a bed alarm is triggered
examples.code:
-- Send out a broadcast to the game server when a bed alarm is triggered
Events.BedAlarmTriggered(function(event)
    local alert = event.intruder.displayName .. " invaded " .. event.team.name .. "'s base!"
    MessageService.broadcast(alert)
end)

ConsumeItem.description: Fires when an item is consumed.

parameters.name: player
parameters.notes: The player that consumed the item.

parameters.name: itemType
parameters.notes: The item that was consumed by the player.

parameters.name: cancelled
parameters.notes: If set to true the item consume will be cancelled.

examples.description: Make a player jump twice as high every time they eat a pie item
examples.code:
-- Make a player jump twice as high every time they eat a pie item
Events.ConsumeItem(function(event)
    if (event.item == ItemType.PIE) then
        event.player:registerJumpHeightMultiplier("pie_jumps", 2)
    end
end)

Enchant.description: Fires when a Player researches an Enchant.

parameters.name: player
parameters.notes: The player who researched the enchant.

parameters.name: enchant
parameters.notes: Type of enchant researched by the player.

parameters.name: cancelled
parameters.notes: If set to true, the enchant research will be cancelled.

examples.description: Play the Learn Fire sound if a player receives a Fire 3 Enchant
examples.code:
Events.Enchant(function(event)
    -- Play the Learn Fire sound if a player receives a Fire 3 Enchant
    if (event.enchant == EnchantType.FIRE_3) then
         SoundService.playSound(Sound.WHIM_LEARN_FIRE)
    end
end)

EntityDamage.description: Fires when an Entity is damaged

parameters.name: entity
parameters.notes: The entity getting damaged.

parameters.name: fromEntity
parameters.notes: The attacker (if one exists).

parameters.name: damage
parameters.notes: Amount of damage that will be dealt.

parameters.name: knockback
parameters.notes: Amount of knockback that will be applied.

parameters.name: cancelled
parameters.notes: If set to true the damage will be cancelled.

examples.description: Double all damage in the game after 15 minutes
examples.code:
Events.EntityDamage(function(event)
    local matchDurationSec = MatchService.getMatchDurationSec()
    -- Double all damage in the game after 15 minutes
    if (matchDurationSec > 15 * 60) then
        event.damage = event.damage * 2
    end
    
    -- Disable damage in first 45s of the game
    if (matchDurationSec < 45) then
        event.cancelled = true;
    end
end)

EntityDeath.description: Fires when an Entity is killed

parameters.name: entity
parameters.notes: The killed entity.

parameters.name: killer
parameters.notes: The killer (or nil if not killed by anyone).

parameters.name: assists
parameters.notes: List of entities who damaged the victim within the last 15s.

parameters.name: finalKill
parameters.notes: True if the killed entity is going to be eliminated after this kill.

examples.description: Give players 10 emeralds when they eliminate another player
examples.code:
-- Give players 10 emeralds when they eliminate another player
Events.EntityDeath(function(event)
    -- Only give payout if this is a player entity
    if (event.entity:getPlayer() == nil) then
        return
    end
    
    -- Only give payout if this is an elimination
    if not event.finalKill then
        return
    end

    -- Pay all assisting players 10 emeralds
    for i, entity in ipairs(event.assists) do
        if not entity:getPlayer() then
            continue
        end
        
        InventoryService.giveItem(entity:getPlayer(), ItemType.EMERALD, 10, true)
    end
end)

parameters.name: entity
parameters.notes: The spawning entity.

examples.description: Make all entities have only 1 health
examples.code:
-- Make all entities have only 1 health
Events.EntitySpawn(function(event)
    event.entity:setMaxHealth(1)
end)

Forged.description: Fires when a Player upgrades an item in the Forge.
warnings: Official docs say this event is no longer compatible with the latest version of the game and should not be used.
The official page does not document parameters or examples for this event.

InventoryItemAdded.description: Fires when a new item is added to a player's inventory.

parameters.name: player
parameters.notes: The player who received a new item.

parameters.name: item
parameters.notes: The type of item received by the player.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.notes: The amount of the item received by the player.

examples.description: Sends a notification to a player that receives the Laser Sword item
examples.code:
Events.InventoryItemAdded(function(event)
    -- Sends a notification to a player that receives the Laser Sword item
    if (event.item == ItemType.LASER_SWORD) then
        MessageService.sendInfo(event.player, "You have unlocked the power of the force!")
    end
end)

ItemPurchase.description: Fires when an item is purchased in the Item Shop.

parameters.name: player
parameters.notes: The player who received a new item.

parameters.name: itemType
parameters.notes: The type of item received by the player.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.notes: The amount of the item received by the player.

parameters.name: costItem
parameters.notes: The type of item used to purchase the specified item.

parameters.name: price
parameters.notes: The amount of the cost item used to purchase the specified item.

examples.description: Refund 50% of all Iron purchases in the shop
examples.code:
-- Refund 50% of all Iron purchases in the shop
Events.ItemPurchase(function(event)
    -- Only refund the player if the resource used to purchase the item is Iron
    if (event.costItem == ItemType.IRON) then
        -- Round 50% of the price to the closest smaller integer
        local refund = math.floor(event.price * 0.5);
        InventoryService.giveItem(event.player, ItemType.IRON, refund, true)
    end
end)

examples.description: Play halloween music at the start of the game
examples.code:
-- Play halloween music at the start of the game
Events.MatchStart(function(event)
    SoundService.playSound(Sound.HALLOWEEN_2022_BOSS_MUSIC)
end)

notes: The official page does not document event fields for MatchStart; use the callback as Events.MatchStart(function(event) ... end).

PlayerChatted.description: Fires when a player sends a chat message

parameters.name: player
parameters.notes: The player that sent the message.

parameters.name: message
parameters.notes: The message sent by the player.

examples.description: Add "/rain {item}" command that rains a resource on all players
examples.code:
-- Add "/rain {item}" command that rains a resource on all players
Events.PlayerChatted(function(event)
    -- Split out command from args
    local commandArgs = string.split(event.message, " ")
    
    local command = string.lower(commandArgs[1])
    
    -- Check that command is "/rain"
    if string.lower(command) ~= "/rain" then
        return
    end
    
    -- Verify message at least has 2 arguments (command & item type)
    if #commandArgs < 2 then
        MessageService.sendInfo(event.player, 'Format: /rain <Item Type>')
        return
    end
    local itemType = string.lower(commandArgs[2])
    
    -- Check that item exists
    if not ItemType[itemType] then
        MessageService.sendInfo(event.player, 'No item exists named ' .. itemType)
        return
    end
    
    local numDrops = 25
    task.spawn(function()
        for i=1,numDrops,1 do
            for i,player in ipairs(PlayerService.getPlayers()) do
                local entity = player:getEntity()
                if not entity then
                    continue
                end
                
                local pos = entity:getPosition()
                pos = pos + Vector3.new(math.random(-5, 5), 8, math.random(-5, 5))
                ItemService.dropItem(itemType, pos)
            end
            task.wait(0.2)
        end
    end)
end)

PlayerAdded.description: Fires when a player joins the game server.

parameters.name: player
parameters.notes: The player that joined the game server.

examples.description: Official docs example

PlayerRemoving.description: Fires when a player is about to leave the game server.

parameters.name: player
parameters.notes: The player that is about to leave the game server.

examples.description: Official docs example

PlayerDropItem.description: Fires when a player drops an item onto the ground.

parameters.name: player
parameters.notes: The player that is dropping the item.

parameters.name: itemType
parameters.notes: The type of item being dropped by the player.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.notes: The amount of the item being dropped by the player.

parameters.name: cancelled
parameters.notes: If set to true, the item drop event will be cancelled.

examples.description: Official docs example
examples.code:
Events.PlayerDropItem(function(event)
    if (event.itemType == ItemType.TENNIS_BALL) then
        event.cancelled = true
        MessageService.sendInfo(event.player, "Be more careful! Those can explode!")
    end
end)

PlayerPickupItem.description: Fires when a player collects an item from the ground.

parameters.name: player
parameters.notes: The player that is picking up the item.

parameters.name: itemType
parameters.notes: The type of item that is being picked up by the player.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.notes: The amount of the item that is being picked up by the player.

parameters.name: cancelled
parameters.notes: If set to true, the item pickup event will be cancelled.

examples.description: Official docs example
examples.code:
Events.PlayerPickupItem(function(event)
    if (event.player:getEntity() == nil) then
        return
    end
    if (event.itemType == ItemType.GLITCH_TRUMPET) then
        EntityService.spawnKitEntity(KitType.MELODY, event.player:getEntity():getPosition())
        AnnouncementService.sendAnnouncement("Let's jam!")
    end
end)

ProjectileLaunched.description: Fires when a projectile is launched.

parameters.name: shooter
parameters.notes: The entity that launched the projectile (may not exist).

parameters.name: projectileType
parameters.notes: The type of projectile that hit.

parameters.name: position
parameters.notes: The position from which the projectile was launched.

parameters.name: velocity
parameters.notes: The velocity of the projectile when launched.

examples.description: Make the shooting player burn for 5 seconds when they launch a fireball
examples.code:
-- Make the shooting player burn for 5 seconds when they launch a fireball
Events.ProjectileLaunched(function(event)
    if (event.shooter == nil) then
        return
    end
    
    if (event.projectileType == "fireball") then
       StatusEffectService.giveEffect(event.shooterEntity, StatusEffectType.BURN, 5)
    end
end)

ProjectileHit.description: Fires when a launched projectile hits something (such as a block or entity)

parameters.name: shooter
parameters.notes: The entity that launched the projectile (may not exist).

parameters.name: projectileType
parameters.notes: The type of projectile that hit.

parameters.name: position
parameters.notes: The position that the projectile hit.

parameters.name: hitEntity
parameters.notes: The entity that was hit by the projectile (may not exist).

parameters.name: cancelled
parameters.notes: If set to true, the projectile hit will be cancelled.

examples.description: Only continue if the projectile that hit was Whim's nature spell
examples.code:
Events.ProjectileHit(function(event)
    -- Only continue if the projectile that hit was Whim's nature spell
    if (event.projectileType == "mage_spell_nature") then
        local blockAt = BlockService.getBlockAt(event.position)
        if (blockAt.blockType == ItemType.DIRT) then
            BlockService.placeBlock(ItemType.GRASS, event.position)
            ModelService.createModel(ModelType.DAISY, blockAt.position + Vector3.new(0,2.5,0))
        end
    end
end)

StatusEffectAdded.description: Fires when a Status Effect is added to an Entity

parameters.name: entity
parameters.notes: The entity that received the status effect.

parameters.name: statusEffect
parameters.notes: The type of status effect that was added to the entity.

examples.description: Give the player a knockback baguette
examples.code:
Events.StatusEffectAdded(function(event)
    if (event.statusEffect == StatusEffectType.NO_KNOCKBACK) then
        local player = event.entity:getPlayer()
        if (player == nil) then
            return
        end
        -- Give the player a knockback baguette
        InventoryService.giveItem(player, ItemType.BAGUETTE, 1, true)
    end
end)

StatusEffectRemoved.description: Fires when a Status Effect is removed from an Entity.

parameters.name: entity
parameters.notes: The entity that had the status effect removed from it.

parameters.name: statusEffect
parameters.notes: The type of status effect that was removed from the entity.

examples.description: Official docs example
examples.code:
Events.StatusEffectRemoved(function(event)
    if (event.statusEffect == StatusEffectType.TITANS_BLESSING) then
        local player = event.entity:getPlayer()
        if (player == nil) then
            return
        end
        SoundService.playSoundForPlayer(player, SoundType.TITAN_IDLE_4)
    end
end)

parameters.name: player
parameters.notes: The player that is swinging the weapon.

parameters.name: weapon
parameters.notes: The ItemType of the weapon being swung.

parameters.name: hitEntity
parameters.notes: The entity that was hit by the sword swing (may not exist if the swing missed).

parameters.name: cancelled
parameters.notes: If set to true, the weapon swing will be cancelled.

examples.description: Official docs example
examples.code:
Events.WeaponSwing(function(event)
    if (event.weapon == ItemType.LASER_SWORD) then
        ItemService.dropItem(ItemType.COSMIC_LUCKY_BLOCK, event.player:getEntity():getPosition())
    end
end)

TeamUpgradePurchased.description: Fires when a Team Upgrade is purchased from the Team Upgrade Shop.

parameters.name: player
parameters.notes: The player who purchased the team upgrade.

parameters.name: team
parameters.notes: The team that received the team upgrade.

parameters.name: upgrade
parameters.notes: The team upgrade that was purchased by the player.

examples.description: Official docs example
examples.code: upgrade

examples.description: Official docs example
examples.code: tier

examples.description: Official docs example
examples.code: MAGIC_I

examples.description: Official docs example
examples.code: MAGIC_II

examples.description: Only proceed if the MAGIC I upgrade was purchased
examples.code:
Events.TeamUpgradePurchased(function(event)
    -- Only proceed if the MAGIC I upgrade was purchased
    if (event.upgrade == TeamUpgradeType.MAGIC_I) then
       local teamPlayers = event.team:getInGamePlayers()
       -- Loop over all players in the team that received the upgrade
        for i, player in pairs(teamPlayers) do
           -- Give each team player 5 telepearls
           InventoryService.giveItem(player, ItemType.TELEPEARL, 5)
        end
    end
end)

TeamUpgradeEraPurchased.description: Fires when a Team Upgrade Era is purchased from the Team Upgrade Shop.

parameters.name: player
parameters.notes: The player who purchased the team upgrade.

parameters.name: team
parameters.notes: The team that received the team upgrade.

parameters.name: era
parameters.notes: The team upgrade era purchased by the player.

examples.description: Only proceed if the Diamond Era was purchased
examples.code:
Events.TeamUpgradeEraPurchased(function(event)
    -- Only proceed if the Diamond Era was purchased
    if (event.upgrade == TeamUpgradeEraType.DIAMOND_ERA) then
       local teamPlayers = event.team:getInGamePlayers()
       -- Loop over all players in the team that received the upgrade
        for i, player in pairs(teamPlayers) do
           -- Give each team player a Diamond Scythe item
           InventoryService.giveItem(player, ItemType.DIAMOND_SCYTHE, 1)
        end
    end
end)

Telepearled.description: Fires when a Player uses a telepearl.

parameters.name: player
parameters.notes: The player that threw the telepearl.

parameters.name: startPos
parameters.notes: The position where the player threw the telepearl.

parameters.name: endPos
parameters.notes: The position where the telepearl landed.

examples.description: When a player uses a telepearl, give them the Decay status effect
examples.code:
-- When a player uses a telepearl, give them the Decay status effect
Events.Telepearled(function(event)
    local entity = event.player:getEntity()
    if (entity == nil) then
        return
    end
    StatusEffectService.giveEffect(entity, StatusEffectType.DECAY)
end)

UseAbility.description: Fires when an entity uses an ability.

parameters.name: entity
parameters.notes: The entity that used the ability.

parameters.name: abilityName
parameters.notes: The ability used by the entity.

parameters.name: cancelled
parameters.notes: If set to true, the ability use will be cancelled.

examples.description: When a player attempts to Recall, turn them invisible for a few seconds
examples.code:
-- When a player attempts to Recall, turn them invisible for a few seconds
Events.UseAbility(function(event)
    if (event.abilityName == "recall") then
        StatusEffectService.giveEffect(event.entity, StatusEffectType.INVISIBILITY, 6)
    end
end)
